mapper.insert: INSERT INTO market_order_item(order_item_id, order_id, product_id, quantity, price, total_price) VALUES (SEQ_MARKET_ORDER_ITEM.NEXTVAL, #{order_id}, #{product_id}, #{quantity}, #{price}, #{total_price})
mapper.select: SELECT i.order_item_id, i.order_id, i.product_id, i.quantity, i.price, i.total_price, p.product_name AS product_name, m.file_name AS file_name FROM market_order_item i INNER JOIN market p ON i.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN product_image m ON p.product_id = m.product_id AND m.is_main = 'Y' WHERE i.order_id = #{order_id}
